California
Fair Political
Practices Comrnission
July 18, ]-99!
Robert D. Beebe
Genera I l.tanager
Dublin San Ramon services District
7o51 Dublin Boulevard
DubIin, CA 94568
Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our FiIe No. I-90-442
Dear l'1r. Beebe:
This letter is in response to your request for advice
regarding the duties and respons ibi 1it ies of the DubLin San Ramon
seivices District newly-appointed Adrninistrative Services Manager/
Finance officer under the disclosure provisions of the PoIitical
Reforn Act (the rrls;rr1.1 Your request for advice does not include
a description of the duties of this new employee. Therefore. we
do not have all material facts pertinent to our analysis, so lre
are provj.ding you with infornal assistance. (ReguJ-aiion L8329.)2
OUESTTON
Under the provisions of the Act, what are the filing 
and
disclosure obligations of the Adrninistrative Services Manager/
Finance officer of the DubLin San Ramon Services District?
CONCLUS ION
Commission staff is now in the process of drafting
regulations to clarify the neaning of "public officials 
who manage
public investrnentsrr as that term is used in Section 87200, as
1 Go.r".rra"nt code sections 81ooO-91015. AII statutory references
are to the Government code unless otherwise indicated. 
Commission
regulations appear at 2 california Code of Regulations section
18OOO, et seo. AII references to regulations are to Title 2,
Division 6 of the California code of Regulations.
2 Informal assistance does not provide the reguestor with the
innunity provided by an opinion or fornal written advice.
(section 83114; Regulation 18329 (c) . )
428 J Street, Suite 8OO . P.O. Box 8O7 o Sacramento CA 95BO+.O8OZ o (916) j 22-5660


our File No. I-9o-442
Page No. 2
anended. Pending adoption of the regulations. the Adrninistrative
services ltanagerT ri.nance officer of the Dublin san Ramon services
District should continue to file comnrission Form 730 statement of
Econornic Interests.
FACTS
The Dublin san Ranon service District (the trdistricttr)
expects to appoint a net Adninistrative Services llanager/ Finance
ofiicer. 
prlsurnauly, this individual vilI be involved in naking
financiat and investment decisions for the district. 
You have
enclosed i.rith your reguest for advice a copy of a proposed
investment progran for the district.
You are the general nanager for the district 
and in that
capacity you seek our advice to deternine whether the
Ad;inistrative Services !'tanager/ Finance officer is required to
file 
Forra 721 rather than Forn 730 Statement of Economic Interests
upon assuning office. 
currently, the . Admin istrative Services
Minager/Finance officer files Com:nission Forn 730.
ANALYS I S
Effective January 1, 1990, Section 872o0 of the Government
code was anended to add city treasurers, county treasurers, and
;oin". public officials 
who manage public investments'r to the list
of perstns who must file Connission Forrn 721 Statement of Economic
Intlrests. 
Any person who fa11s rrithin one of these categories,
or is a canaiaitl for any of these offices which is elective, is
now subject to the conf I ict-of- interest disclosure requirernents of
the Act.
As I advised you during the course of our conversation on
June 4, L99L, stafi is in the process of adopting regulations to
clarify the tern rrother public officials 
vho nanage public
investmentsrr as that term is used in section a'?zoo- Pending
adoption of the regulations, staff is providing interim advice
that persons who are "designated employees" in their agency's
conf I ict-of- interest code rnay continue to file a Fortn 730 State-
ment of Economic Interests with their filing officer.
Accordingly, the person discharging the duties of
Administrative Services l.tanager/ Finance officer for the district
should continue to file comrnission Form 730 Statement of Economic
Interests.
As you are aware, your narne has been previously added to the
list of interested persons who have reguested information on the
subject. 
We will continue to keep you informed of any progress in
the definition of the term I'public officials 
who manage public
investnents . rr

sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
